title: baerchen201's modpack
description: Vanilla Minecraft with some client-side improvements
body:
This is an updated version of my modpack.

I usually put together an update _(recreate the entire pack)_ every couple releases of Minecraft.

<hr>

### Features:
- Performance mods
  
  _Mods that make the Game run better and smoother, even on lower-end devices_
- Convinience/QoL mods
  
  _Mods that improve the general playing experience, like adding player heads and timestamps to the chat, displaying all available recipies and mouse tweaks in the inventory_
- Graphical improvements
  
  _Mods & Resourcepacks that make the game look better while still retaining the familiar vanilla look. This includes a configured shader, connected textures (not just for glass) and a bunch of particles_
- Sound improvements
  
  _Mods & Soundpacks that improve on the boring silence of vanilla. They add ambient sounds, various footstep sounds and realistic echo & sound physics. No voice chat mod is included_

The modpack is configured for an average PC. If you use an older computer or a laptop, please consider lowering the graphics settings, as well as turning off the shader.

<hr>

Important hotkeys (might vary slightly depending on your keyboard layout, i use qwertz):
- R - Toggle shader (please unbind this in the Controls settings if you don't have a powerful PC, it is quite easy to hit accidentally)
- N - Show Waypoints (Journeymap)
- M - Show Fullscreen map (Journeymap)
- C - Zoom (While zoomed in, scrolling changes the zoom amount)
- Alt + [1-9] - Load saved hotbar (Creative mode)
- AltGr + [1-9] - Save hotbar (Creative mode)
- F3 + A - Reload chunks (this might help if the chunks aren't loading correctly)

<hr>

_All screenshots were taken on a private server (vanilla) with shader and distant horizons.
Full quality versions can be found [here](https://github.com/baerchen201/minecraft-screenshots/commit/84be71ddba1e6294ff114d19bc8e72e532216b46)._
